# Modulato

> The animation-first React framework for marketing sites, landing pages and
> portfolios. Page transitions with coexisting layouts, a persistent URL-aware
> shell, and motion tokens tweakable live — designed LLM-first.

Modulato projects are built for agents: scaffold with `npx modulato new`, edit
files directly, always finish with `npx modulato check` (the contract
validator). Every CLI command is non-interactive and takes `--json`. An MCP
server (`npx modulato-mcp`) exposes routes, scaffolds, contracts and live
motion tokens.

Start a project:

    npm create modulato@latest my-site

## Docs

- [Complete reference](https://modulato.org/llms-full.txt): the entire framework — conventions, hooks, motion tokens, transitions, content, server actions, CLI, MCP, deploy — in one file (MODULATO.md; also copied into every scaffolded project)

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/glauberxyz/modulato): source, design document (PLAN.md), issues
- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/modulato): the `modulato` package (CLI included)
- [Live demo](https://modulato-demo.vercel.app): three pages exercising every framework concept
